videos.headline: Peppers scores his second TD of first half
videos.description: Jabrill Peppers scores his second touchdown of the game to give Michigan a 43-0 lead over Rutgers before the half.

videos.headline: Michigan dominates Rutgers
videos.description: A week after losing 58-0 to Ohio State, Rutgers gets beat even worse by Michigan 78-0. The Wolverines tie a school record with nine rushing touchdowns.

videos.headline: Ref wipes out going backwards
videos.description: This referee falls down trying to move backwards before Michigan kicks an extra point.

videos.headline: Smith fumbles on Michigan's 37-yard line, Rutgers recovers
videos.description: De'Veon Smith run for a loss of 1 yard to the Mich 37 De'Veon Smith fumbled, forced by Sebastian Joseph, recovered by Rutgr Darnell Davis

videos.headline: Peppers puts on the jets for 63-yd gain
videos.description: Michigan's Jabrill Peppers rushes 63 yards to the Rutgers 4-yard line for a first down.

videos.headline: Isaac runs it in for first Michigan TD
videos.description: After Jabrill Peppers' 63-yard rush sets up the Wolverines at the 4-yard line, RB Ty Isaac runs the ball into the end zone to give Michigan a 7-0 lead over Rutgers.

videos.headline: Chesson lays out for 30-yard TD
videos.description: Michigan QB Wilton Speight connects with Jehu Chesson for a 30-yard touchdown to extend the Wolverines' lead to 14-0 over Rutgers.

videos.headline: Allen fumbles the ball on a hard hit, Michigan recovers in the red zone
videos.description: Zach Allen run for 1 yd to the Rutgr 7 Zach Allen fumbled, forced by Delano Hill, recovered by Mich Bryan Mone

videos.headline: J. Peppers run for 7 yds for a TD
videos.description: Jabrill Peppers run for 7 yds for a TD

videos.headline: Evans breaks multiple tackles for 43-yard gain
videos.description: Chris Evans breaks free from several Rutgers defenders, but is brought down at the 1-yard line, setting up Michigan for another touchdown in the second quarter.

videos.headline: K. Hill run for 1 yd for a TD
videos.description: Khalid Hill run for 1 yd for a TD

videos.headline: Michigan fakes extra point, scores two
videos.description: After a Khalid Hill 1-yard touchdown in the second quarter, Michigan fakes the extra point setting up Garrett Moores for a two-point conversion as the Wolverines take a commanding 29-0 lead over Rutgers.

videos.headline: Wolverines defender delivers huge hit
videos.description: Michigan LB Ben Gedeon levels Rutgers WR Jawuan Harris for a loss of six yards.

videos.headline: Darboh's beautiful catch puts Michigan at the 8-yard line
videos.description: Amara Darboh evades a Rutgers defender and hauls in a great catch from Wilton Speight in the second quarter.

videos.headline: K. Hill run for 1 yd for a TD
videos.description: Khalid Hill run for 1 yd for a TD

videos.headline: Khalid Hill 11 Yd pass from John O'Korn
videos.description: Khalid Hill 11 Yd pass from John O'Korn

videos.headline: C. Evans run for 58 yds for a 1ST down
videos.description: Chris Evans run for 58 yds to the Rutgr 15 for a 1ST down

videos.headline: Michigan's Higdon zig-zags into the end zone
videos.description: Karan Higdon rushes 15 yards for a third-quarter touchdown to extend Michigan's lead to 56-0 over Rutgers.

videos.headline: B. Henderson run for 13 yds for a TD
videos.description: Bobby Henderson run for 13 yds for a TD

videos.headline: Higdon's score gives Michigan 71-0 lead
videos.description: Karan Higdon scores the Wolverines' eighth rushing touchdown of the game giving Michigan a commanding 71-0 lead over Rutgers.

videos.headline: Isaac scores Michigan's ninth rushing TD, Wolverines up 78-0
videos.description: Ty Issac rushes for 34 yards to give Michigan a 78-0 lead over Rutgers and ties a school record for rushing touchdowns in a single game.
